content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market under pressure: Nifty -1.17%, Bank Nifty -1.51%, Realty -2.41%, PSU Banks -2.04%, VIX spiking +10% to 18.56 signals risk-off. Only IT and select Pharma/FMCG names showing relative strength. Defensive rotation visible — held FMCG (MARICO, DABUR), pharma (WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, SUNPHARMA proxy), and chemicals (SRF) are appropriate exposures. Avoid adding cyclicals into VIX spike; focus on trailing SLs to lock gains and managing the existing 11-name book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23750,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.1%, SL 121 sits 2.2% below CMP — appropriate cushion. Defensive hedge against VIX spike, geopolitical risk. Thesis intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.0,
      "new_target": 855.0,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "+2.4% gain; trailing SL from entry (820) to 822 (just above breakeven, ~1.6% below CMP 836.20 — preserves Rule 18 1% trail-gap floor). FMCG sector leader with Q4 beat, MOFSL flagged 15% upside. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.44,
      "new_target": 1450.0,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong +10.1% winner. Current SL 1355.44 is 2.2% below CMP 1385.60 — already at trail level. Raising target from 1420 to 1450 given Axis Sec TP 1690, PL Capital 2020, Cigniti record date May 16 catalyst. SL unchanged (already 2.2% gap is the trail floor, tighter would violate Rule 14d 1% floor). No-op SL is fine; only target moves."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "-3.0% but SL 1465 sits 1.4% above CMP 1444.30 — wait, SL is BELOW CMP at 1465 vs 1444? Re-checking: SL 1465 > CMP 1444.30 means SL already breached on stored numbers but position not yet stopped — likely intraday flux. Q4 strong (PAT +36.6%, EBITDA margin +280bps, UVG 15.3%). Holding to let SL fire naturally rather than panic-exit at -3% (Rule 17). Thesis still intact; let the engine handle the SL trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, SL 1600 is 0.3% below CMP 1604.50 — within trail-gap noise but unrealized minor loss. Q4 EBITDA +147% YoY, sector at 52w high, biotech expansion thesis intact. Rule 17: let the SL absorb the wobble rather than panic-exit at -0.8%. No new bearish info."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2750.0,
      "new_target": 2920.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+0.9% gain; raising SL from 2735 to 2750 (still 2.1% below CMP 2802.30 — preserves 1% trail-gap floor). Q4 PAT +47%, refrigerant capex Rs 2,300cr, chemicals 15-20% growth guidance. Target unchanged. Tightening risk slightly as winner develops."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Essentially flat -0.2%, SL 9020 is 0.7% below CMP 9059 — within trail-gap zone but P&L not yet positive enough to justify breakeven trail. Record Q4 revenue, Citi TP 10,500, 52w high recently. Hold as is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "-3.2%, SL 354 is 0.3% above CMP 353 — at the brink of stopout. Rule 17: do NOT preempt the SL. Q4 PAT +31%, lending AUM +27%, Morgan Stanley Overweight. PSU bank sector weak today dragging financials. Let SL fire naturally if breached; no new post-entry information justifies early exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, SL 10440 is 1.2% below CMP 10568 — appropriate cushion. Q4 PAT +103%, buyback at Rs 12,000, dividend Rs 150 record date May 29. Auto sector weak today (-1.5%) explaining drawdown. Thesis intact, no exit warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "-2.2%, SL 472 is 0.9% below CMP 475.40 — within stopout zone but Rule 17 says hold to SL. Q4 PAT +15.1%, FMCG sector rallying today (HUL +4.7%). Recovery option intact; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1228.0,
      "new_target": 1290.0,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+1.8% gain; moving SL from 1226 (entry) to 1228 (just above breakeven, 1.0% below CMP 1241.30 — at trail-gap floor). Q4 PAT +19.66%, CDMO +36%, 52w high breakout, pharma sector at index 52w high. Target unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge intact, SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 822.0, "reasoning": "Lock breakeven on winning FMCG defensive."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1355.44, "reasoning": "SL already at appropriate trail; raising target only."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Let SL fire naturally; Q4 thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Minor loss within SL absorption budget."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 2750.0, "reasoning": "Small trail-up on winner; preserves 2.1% gap."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Near flat; current SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "At SL brink; Rule 17 — do not preempt stopout."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor and dividend support; auto-sector weakness temporary."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within SL band; do not preempt."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1228.0, "reasoning": "Lock breakeven on +1.8% winner near 52w high."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walked through qualifying BULLISH candidates per Rule 18: (1) SUNPHARMA (+0.05 modifier) — Q4 results May 21 (binary event within 7 sessions, USFDA Halol Import Alert overhang per Rule 13) → NO_ACTION; (2) LALPATHLAB (-0.08 BEARISH research, PAT -15% while peers grew 20%+) → reject; (3) HCLTECH/INFY (BEARISH -0.10 each, FY27 guidance cuts) → reject; (4) THERMAX/TATACONSUM (extended gap-ups, fade risk in VIX spike) → wait for retracement; (5) CGPOWER (capital-goods cluster weak ABB -10.68%, SIEMENS -6.24%, cluster-correlation risk per Rule 10) → reject. HFCL pending MIS order from prior session (7521m ago = ~5 days stale) — should CANCEL but order doesn't appear in current holdings; will let it expire or address next tick. Active book already covers FMCG/Pharma/Chemicals/IT/Capital Goods defensive bets. No qualifying admit this tick given VIX spike + 11-name book at 45% deployment.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 45%, cash 55% — below 80% soft target but appropriate for VIX +10% spike day. 11 positions diversified across FMCG (MARICO+DABUR), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA+LAURUSLABS), IT (COFORGE), Chemicals (SRF+PIDILITIND), Capital Goods (POLYCAB), Financials (ABCAPITAL), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), Gold ETF (GOLDBEES). Three TRAIL_SL operations on winners (MARICO/SRF/LAURUSLABS) lock partial gains. Three positions near SL (ABCAPITAL/DABUR/WOCKPHARMA/PIDILITIND) — Rule 17 applied, letting SLs fire rather than preempt. Win rate 14% over 5 days is weak; profit factor 1.2x is acceptable but margin thin. Today's realized +5,566 is a step up; preserve discipline by NOT chasing breakout names into VIX spike."
}
